title: Callbacks to async/await
description:
Welcome to Rank Challenge. This function fetches a record using the old callback style with `(err, data) =>`. Callback nesting is hard to read and easy to get wrong.

Refactor it into an `async` function that `await`s the promise-based `db.find(id)`. Remove the callback-style call entirely.
objectives: Use `await db.find(id)` instead of the callback
hints: Mark the function `async` and `await` the promise returned by `db.find(id)`.
Delete the `(err, data) =>` callback argument; the awaited value is the data.
